observations: Mercury’s severe combustion weakens the public voice, so the yoga works best when you lead with judgment, not with rapid speech
Strong sub-periods also come when Saturn and Sun are involved, because Saturn steadies your gains and Sun carries 6th-house victory; these are the climbs, not the applause
So the main windows are Jupiter–Mercury now, then Jupiter–Mercury–Jupiter, and later Jupiter–Mercury–Saturn, with the wider Jupiter mahadasha holding the whole promise until 2035
remedies: Light a lamp on Thursdays and say one clear intention for your work; let Jupiter carry what the mouth cannot.
